title: Pudding’s Betrayal Is Revealed
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Sanji, Pudding as Sanji learns the truth about Pudding and Big Mom’s plan while the crew looks for a way out.
scene: The truth behind Pudding and Big Mom’s plan breaks Sanji’s hope, while the crew gathers critical information and allies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AHAHAHA! All 6 Vin- Smokes...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will end up being hollowed out like beehives by tomorrow!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: She was his only ray of hope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Rumble Rumble...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The ceremony Hall...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will be stained in the color of red!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But make sure to be careful when you die, too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you get any of your blood on the wedding cake,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Click

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mama will get mad and destroy the entire ceremony hall!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: A Walker 36 caliber Perclusion Revolution.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: inside, we have what we call "Candy- jacketed bullets".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're durable enough to pierce right through the backplate shield of an armored soldier!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've already got a taste of this though, so you should know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: After all, aren't you all known...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Drip drip

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: For having "Iron Bodies"?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fulfufu... i can't wait for tomorrow! ♔ I can already imagine the priceless transition of Sanji's expression from faithful joy to pure despair as i point my gun to his head!\\

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: gyahahaha, that'd be one hell of a spectacle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: NITRO the jelly

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: RABIAN the carpet

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: that fool seriously does think...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: that you're head over heels for him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Fufu... this is going to be amazing.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you think he'll make this kind of face?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: gyahaha- haha that's impressively good!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Or like this?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: PU... PUDDING- TSWAN...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Gaha- Hahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey, why aren't you saying anything?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's your little brother, for heaven's sake! Hahaha...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you want to know how the proposal went down?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've got to hear this!! When I peeled off his mask, his face was screwed up beyond belief!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once I brought in the waterworks, he was totally finished!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Men are such idiots.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I won't let our marriage...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Become hell for you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: there and then, he embraced me tightly,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and squeezed out the cheesiest line I've ever heard.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I WULLV YOUUUUUUUUUUU!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Les GED mawwied!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: gyahaha, spot-on impress- sion!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Les GED mawwied!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed storyline with 43 dialogue beats. Pudding’s deception and Big Mom’s intentions become clear, changing the rescue from infiltration to survival.
